基于 Rust russh 库构建，提供安全、高性能的 SSH 连接。支持密码和.message: Built on Rust's russh library for secure, high-performance SSH connections. Supports password and key authentication, proxy forwarding, and TOFU host key verification.

内置文件浏览器，直接在侧边栏管理远程文件。支持上传、下载、重命名、权限修改等操作.message: Built-in file explorer to manage remote files directly from the sidebar. Supports upload, download, rename, permission changes, and real-time transfer progress.

同时管理多个 SSH 和本地终端会话。支持 WebGL 硬件加速渲染、自定义字体.message: Manage multiple SSH and local terminal sessions simultaneously. WebGL hardware-accelerated rendering, custom fonts, keyword highlighting, and fuzzy command history search.

通过 WebDAV 或 S3 兼容存储同步 NyaTerm 的可移植配置，并为连.message: Sync NyaTerm's portable configuration through WebDAV, S3-compatible storage, Gist, or drive providers.

深色/浅色主题切换、可调整面板布局、快捷命令管理、多语言翻译、快捷键自定义，打造.message: Dark/light theme switching, resizable panel layouts, quick command management, multi-language translation, customizable shortcuts — build your own workflow.

基于 Tauri 和 React 构建，跨平台、安全、快速.message: Built with Tauri and React — cross-platform, secure, and fast

现代高性能 SSH 客户端，基于 Tauri 和 React 构建.message: A modern, high-performance SSH client built with Tauri and React

NyaTerm 日间主题功能截图.message: NyaTerm feature screenshot in light theme

NyaTerm 夜间主题功能截图.message: NyaTerm feature screenshot in dark theme

NyaTerm 日间主题产品截图.message: NyaTerm product screenshot in light theme

NyaTerm 夜间主题产品截图.message: NyaTerm product screenshot in dark theme

用于 SSH、串口和本地命令行工作的桌面终端客户端。.message: A desktop terminal client for SSH, serial connections, and local command-line work.

NyaTerm 将终端会话、远程文件、认证信息、端口转发和配置备份放在同一个桌面.message: NyaTerm brings terminal sessions, remote files, credentials, port forwarding, and configuration backups into one desktop app for daily development, server maintenance, and device debugging.

安装并建立第一个连接.message: Install and create your first connection

了解安装方式、创建连接和进入工作区的基本流程。.message: Learn the basics of installation, connection setup, and entering the workspace.

查看 SSH、SFTP、终端操作、OTP、主题、代理和同步备份的具体用法。.message: See detailed guides for SSH, SFTP, terminal operations, OTP, themes, proxies, and cloud sync.

了解各版本新增功能、行为调整和需要注意的兼容性变化。.message: Review new features, behavior changes, and compatibility notes across releases.

支持 SSH、本地 shell、Telnet 和串口会话，可在标签页和分屏中同时.message: Supports SSH, local shell, Telnet, and serial sessions, with tabs and split layouts for simultaneous work.

提供搜索、命令历史建议、时间戳、关键词高亮和大输出保护。.message: Provides search, command history suggestions, timestamps, keyword highlighting, and large-output protection.

包含 SFTP、OTP、代理、跳板机、端口转发和主机密钥校验。.message: Includes SFTP, OTP, proxies, jump hosts, port forwarding, and host key verification.

可通过 WebDAV 或 S3 兼容存储保存加密配置快照。.message: Save encrypted configuration snapshots through WebDAV or S3-compatible storage.

在一个工作区中组织多种会话.message: Organize multiple session types in one workspace

SSH、本地 shell、Telnet 和串口会话使用同一套标签页与分屏布局，便.message: SSH, local shell, Telnet, and serial sessions share the same tab and split-pane layout, making it easy to view different hosts, devices, or tasks side by side.

用标签页区分不同连接、任务或环境.message: Use tabs to separate different connections, tasks, or environments

在单个标签页内横向或纵向拆分终端区域.message: Split terminal areas horizontally or vertically within a single tab

在侧边区域查看会话列表、文件和资源信息.message: View session lists, files, and resource information in side panels

用背景图定制主窗口氛围.message: Customize the workspace mood with a background image

主窗口支持本地背景图，可在保留面板可读性的同时营造更个性化的工作区视觉效果。.message: The main window supports a local background image so you can create a more personal workspace look without sacrificing panel readability.

使用本地图片作为主窗口的 Background Image.message: Use a local image as the main window Background Image

通过 cover、contain、stretch 和 tile 控制图片铺法.message: Control the image layout with cover, contain, stretch, and tile

分别调整 Image Opacity 和 Background Content.message: Adjust Image Opacity and Background Content Opacity separately

改进命令输入和输出阅读.message: Improve command input and output reading

终端区域提供搜索、命令历史建议和输出标记，减少在长日志、重复命令和排错信息之间来.message: The terminal area provides search, command history suggestions, and output markers to reduce the effort of navigating long logs, repeated commands, and troubleshooting output.

根据历史命令提供输入建议.message: Suggest input based on command history

支持终端内搜索、选中文本搜索和翻译.message: Support in-terminal search, selected-text search, and translation

可显示时间戳、动作链接和关键词高亮.message: Show timestamps, action links, and keyword highlighting

在终端旁处理远程文件.message: Work with remote files beside the terminal

SFTP 文件浏览器与终端工作区并列使用，适合查看日志、上传构建产物或调整远程配.message: Use the SFTP file explorer alongside the terminal workspace to inspect logs, upload build artifacts, or adjust remote configuration files.

支持上传、下载、重命名、移动、删除和属性查看.message: Supports upload, download, rename, move, delete, and property inspection

传输任务可暂停、继续、取消和失败重试.message: Transfer tasks can be paused, resumed, canceled, and retried after failure

本地编辑文件后可自动回传到远端路径.message: Automatically upload files back to the remote path after local editing

管理连接认证和网络访问方式.message: Manage connection auth and network access methods

围绕 SSH 连接所需的凭据、主机校验、一次性口令、代理和端口转发提供统一配置入.message: Provides a unified place to configure credentials, host verification, one-time passwords, proxies, and port forwarding for SSH connections.

保存密码、私钥和 known hosts，并使用本地加密存储.message: Store passwords, private keys, and known hosts with local encryption

支持 TOTP / HOTP、二维码导入和 SSH 登录自动填充.message: Supports TOTP / HOTP, QR code import, and SSH login autofill

配置代理、跳板机、本地转发、远程转发和动态转发.message: Configure proxies, jump hosts, local forwarding, remote forwarding, and dynamic forwarding

NyaTerm 可将连接、凭据配置和常用设置打包为加密快照，用于备份、迁移或在多.message: NyaTerm can package connections, credential settings, and common preferences into encrypted snapshots for sync across devices.

使用主密码保护同步和备份数据.message: Protect cloud sync data with a master password

支持 `.nya` 导入导出，并处理远端与本地版本冲突.message: Supports `.nya` import/export and handles version conflicts between remote and local data

支持 SSH、串口、本地 shell、SFTP 和配置备份的桌面终端客户端.message: A desktop terminal client for SSH, serial, local shell, SFTP, and cloud-synced configuration

查看 NyaTerm 的版本演进与功能更新记录.message: View NyaTerm's release history and feature updates
